summary: Tested 4 commission-related fixes: 1) TL commission no 18K rule - PASS, 2) TL earns from team members' deals - PASS, 3) CS Dashboard shows My Commission section - PASS, 4) Sales Dashboard shows Deal-wise Commission table and Net Pay Trend chart - PASS. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified for CS Dashboard and Sales Dashboard.
passed_tests: CEO can access commission dashboard API
Sanjeed earned_tl > 0 from team members' deals (earned_tl=5260)
Sanjeed team_tl_details populated with 21 team member deals
Aleesha can access own commission via API
Aleesha has earned_details with deal information
CS agent can access commission dashboard API
CS agent has commission details (earned, pending, upgrades)
Scatter data returns correct structure (base_salary, commission, net_pay)
TL earns commission regardless of 18K benchmark
CS Dashboard shows My Commission section with earned AED 1,475 and 11 upgrades
Sales Dashboard shows Deal-wise Commission table with 5 deals totaling AED 2,665
Sales Dashboard shows Net Pay Trend chart with 3 lines (Base Salary, Commission, Net Pay)
Sales Dashboard shows 18K Benchmark cleared indicator
Sales Dashboard shows Category Progress (Silver category)
Sales executive home page shows only My Self-Service and Sales sections
No environment badge visible for sales_executive (correct)
critical_code_review_comments: _calc_sales_commissions function correctly implements TL/SM no-18K-benchmark logic (line 26177: is_tl_or_sm = agent_role in ('team_leader', 'sales_manager'))
TL commission from team members correctly queries via team_leader_id field (line 26214-26215)
CS Dashboard correctly fetches /api/commissions/dashboard and renders myCommission section
Sales Dashboard correctly shows Deal-wise Commission table and Net Pay Trend chart with 3 lines
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 commission fixes verified: 1) TL has no 18K benchmark rule - is_tl_or_sm flag correctly set, 2) TL earns from team members via team_leader_id field - Sanjeed has 21 team deals earning 5260 TL commission, 3) CS Dashboard shows My Commission section with earned/pending amounts and deal details, 4) Sales Dashboard shows Deal-wise Commission table and Net Pay Trend chart with 3 lines (Base Salary, Commission, Net Pay). Sidebar correctly shows only Sales/SSHR/Settings for sales_executive. No environment badge visible for non-super_admin users.

tl_no_18k_rule.description: TL/SM have no 18K benchmark - commissions always earned
tl_no_18k_rule.verification: Sanjeed (team_leader) has is_tl_or_sm=True, earns commission regardless of benchmark

tl_earns_from_team_members.description: TL earns TL commission from team members' deals via team_leader_id field
tl_earns_from_team_members.implementation: server.py lines 26213-26237: queries team members by team_leader_id and sums TL commissions
tl_earns_from_team_members.verification: Sanjeed has earned_tl=5260 from 21 team member deals in team_tl_details

cs_dashboard_my_commission.description: CS agents see commission details on CS Dashboard
cs_dashboard_my_commission.implementation: CSDashboard.jsx fetches /api/commissions/dashboard and renders myCommission section
cs_dashboard_my_commission.verification: Nasida (cs_agent) sees My Commission section with AED 1,475 earned, 11 upgrades

sales_dashboard_commission_ui.description: Sales Dashboard shows Deal-wise Commission table and Net Pay Trend chart
sales_dashboard_commission_ui.implementation: SalesDashboard.jsx renders commissionInfo with deal_details table and scatterData chart
sales_dashboard_commission_ui.verification: Aleesha sees Deal-wise Commission (5 deals, AED 2,665 total) and Net Pay Trend with 3 lines

sidebar_role_filtering.description: Sales executive sees only Sales, SSHR, Settings sections
sidebar_role_filtering.verification: Aleesha home page shows only My Self-Service and Sales sections

environment_badge_visibility.description: No testing badge visible for non-super_admin users
environment_badge_visibility.verification: No environment badge visible for Aleesha (sales_executive)
